title: Reading and Use of English - Part 7
description: You are going to read an article about four people who talk about their film preferences. For questions 43–52, choose from the people (A–D). The people may be chosen more than once.

texts.A:
### Rachel, 26, Graphic Designer
[43]I love watching comedies because they help me relax after a long day.[/43] [44]Going to the cinema with friends is my favourite weekend activity.[/44] [45]I don't like horror films—they make me too nervous.[/45]
texts.B:
### Liam, 33, Journalist
[46]Documentaries are my top choice because I enjoy learning new things.[/46] [47]I also appreciate films based on true stories.[/47] [48]Sometimes, I watch foreign films to practise languages.[/48]
texts.C:
### Julia, 21, Student
[49]Animated movies remind me of my childhood.[/49] [50]I often watch them with my younger siblings.[/50] [51]I think action films are too predictable.[/51]
texts.D:
### Oscar, 39, Chef
[52]I prefer thrillers and mysteries—they keep me guessing.[/52] [43]I rarely go to the cinema; I usually watch films at home.[/43] [44]I like to discuss movies with friends afterwards.[/44]

questions.question: usually watches films at home?
questions.explanation: Oscar rarely goes to the cinema and usually watches films at home.

questions.question: enjoys going to the cinema with friends?
questions.explanation: Rachel's favourite weekend activity is going to the cinema with friends.

questions.question: does not like horror films?
questions.explanation: Rachel doesn't like horror films because they make her nervous.

questions.question: prefers documentaries for learning?
questions.explanation: Liam prefers documentaries because he enjoys learning new things.

questions.question: likes films based on real events?
questions.explanation: Liam appreciates films based on true stories.

questions.question: watches foreign films to practise languages?
questions.explanation: Liam sometimes watches foreign films to practise languages.

questions.question: finds animated movies nostalgic?
questions.explanation: Julia says animated movies remind her of her childhood.

questions.question: watches films with younger siblings?
questions.explanation: Julia often watches animated movies with her younger siblings.

questions.question: thinks action films are too predictable?
questions.explanation: Julia thinks action films are too predictable.

questions.question: enjoys thrillers and mysteries?
questions.explanation: Oscar prefers thrillers and mysteries because they keep him guessing.
